professor.name: Prof. Dong Kun Lee
professor.role: Professor at Mokpo National Maritime University and lead of the Optimized Ship Production Technology Laboratory
professor.summary: His research connects smart shipyard planning, production simulation, machine learning models, 3D scanning, quality control, reverse engineering, additive manufacturing, Physical AI, and collaborative robotics.
